name: processor-setup
description: Install ML stack for meeting minutes processor on AL2023

commands: dnf install -y libsndfile libsndfile-devel gcc gcc-c++ git tar xz gzip
dnf install -y python3.11 python3.11-pip python3.11-devel 2>/dev/null && PYVER=python3.11 || true
if [ -z "$PYVER" ]; then dnf install -y python3 python3-pip python3-devel && PYVER=python3; fi
cd /tmp && tar xf ffmpeg.tar.xz && cp ffmpeg-*-static/ffmpeg /usr/local/bin/ && cp ffmpeg-*-static/ffprobe /usr/local/bin/
/opt/processor/venv/bin/pip install --no-cache-dir faster-whisper==1.1.0 pyannote.audio==3.3.2 soundfile==0.12.1 transformers==4.49.0 tiktoken boto3 matplotlib
/opt/processor/venv/bin/pip install --no-cache-dir got-ocr2 || echo 'WARN: got-ocr2 install failed, will use transformers fallback'
/opt/processor/venv/bin/python3 -c "from faster_whisper import WhisperModel; WhisperModel('large-v3-turbo', device='cpu', compute_type='int8'); print('Whisper model OK')"

/opt/processor/venv/bin/python3 -c "from transformers import AutoModel, AutoTokenizer; AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained('stepfun-ai/GOT-OCR-2.0-hf', trust_remote_code=True); AutoModel.from_pretrained('stepfun-ai/GOT-OCR-2.0-hf', trust_remote_code=True); print('GOT-OCR model OK')" || echo 'WARN: GOT-OCR model download failed'

export HF_TOKEN=$(aws secretsmanager get-secret-value --secret-id prod-voice-meeting-minutes/hf-token --region ap-east-1 --query SecretString --output text | python3 -c "import sys,json;print(json.load(sys.stdin)['HF_TOKEN'])")

/opt/processor/venv/bin/python3 -c "import os; from pyannote.audio import Pipeline; Pipeline.from_pretrained('pyannote/speaker-diarization-3.1', use_auth_token=os.environ['HF_TOKEN']); print('pyannote model OK')"
test -f /opt/processor/venv/bin/python3 || (echo 'FATAL: python3 not found in venv' && exit 1)
test -d /opt/processor/models && echo 'Models directory OK' || (echo 'FATAL: models dir missing' && exit 1)
